title: Chrome MCP + Plant Gallery
prompt:
test chrome mcp
download all images and videos of this conversation
move them here, to ~/death/plant-gallery-v1, then build a web tool for me to view and select as in shopping to buy
summary: Connected Chrome browser via MCP. Downloaded Messenger conversation photos. Built a plant gallery with dark theme, image grid, lightbox, and cart panel.

title: Cloudflare infrastructure setup
prompt: wrangler login, create D1/KV/R2
summary: Wrangler login, created D1 database (pensieve-db), KV namespace (SESSION), R2 bucket (pensieve-media). Wired bindings into wrangler.jsonc.

title: Plant gallery migration + deploy
prompt:
the cart feature needs a quantity input + migrate to pensieve
deploy
summary: Migrated plant gallery to Pensieve. Added quantity controls to cart. Deployed to huuloc.com/plant-gallery/. 68 files uploaded.

title: GitHub Actions CI/CD
prompt: can deployment be done on github?
summary: Created .github/workflows/deploy.yml with Node 22, bun, and wrangler-action. Automated deployment on push to main.

title: Language chooser + UI polish
prompt:
lang chooser should be a dropdown, use cookies not url params
lang chooser should be on far right
home should be to root
summary: Replaced VI/EN links with a dropdown menu matching Categories style. Language stored via cookie. Home link changed to root domain.

title: Session logging system
prompt:
logs on the conversations to an md file, always do so
create the session log sub agent for ./pensieve
summary: Created session-log.md and session-logger subagent. Set up UserPromptSubmit hook for automatic prompt capture. Dual system: hook for capture, agent for summaries.

title: Comment moderation subagent
prompt:
does the comment section work?
build a sub agent for comment moderation
should note that comments are moderated
summary: Created moderate-comments subagent at .claude/agents/moderate-comments.md. Verified EmDash comments work out of the box. Added moderation notice below comment form.

title: GitHub login for admin
prompt:
create an admin account for me
should allow me to log in using github
summary: Configured EmDash GitHub OAuth. User created a GitHub OAuth App, set secrets via wrangler. GitHub login now available at the admin UI.

title: Resend email provider plugin
prompt:
how do I get notified when new comments on pensieve are posted?
email to deathemperor@gmail.com
don't see the settings
summary: Created plugins/plugin-resend/ — provides email delivery via Resend API and sends notifications on new comments. Fixed capability requirements and Block Kit admin settings page.

title: Cloudflare Email Routing
prompt:
now I need to create a me@huuloc.com email that will be sent to my loctruongh@gmail.com account
you do it
summary: Enabled Email Routing for huuloc.com. Created me@huuloc.com forwarding to loctruongh@gmail.com via wrangler CLI.

title: Subscription + engagement analytics
prompt: Build a subscription feature. Posting new posts will have an option to diable sending out. Send a welcome message when subscribed. Build an admin analytics for subscriptions with tracking of clicks from emails. Build an analytics to track reading time, what readers focus on most of each posts, all the advanced engagement analytics.
summary: Planned plugin-pensieve-engage: email subscriptions with welcome emails, newsletter dispatch on publish with per-post opt-out, click/open tracking in emails, and reading engagement analytics (scroll depth, reading time, section focus via IntersectionObserver). 5-phase implementation. Single trusted plugin using page:fragments for tracker injection.

title: Room of Requirement + Priori Incantatem
prompt: wire to session log. then rebuild session logs into a nice feature to display it so that it can record timeline of building by claude code. the feature should also cite that the site is built using claude code. the logs should attach claude code version and model version so that overtime it records model changes, along with its date as a diary. this is a seperate section of the site. I wanna name it something Harry Potter-ish (as the site is)
summary: Built the build section (Room of Requirement) with architecture overview, tech stack, and subagents. Created Priori Incantatem — a timeline diary recording every Claude Code session with model versions.

title: Trương about page
prompt: build a /trương page. this is my last name. this is my about me, my origin and what I do, should again have links to my profile pages, my github commit stats and histories infographic (real time data)
summary: Built about page at /Trương with origin story bio, profile links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Facebook, email), and live GitHub infographic fetched from GitHub API at request time — stats, activity chart, recent repos grid, and activity feed timeline.

title: Content signals + Claude Code attribution + coding eras
prompt:
make sure the page is SEO and comply with cloudflare https://contentsignals.org/
also, add into build section what is done by claude code (all codes are, deployments are, translationg aren't)
btw, the git infographics should highlight the moment I switch fully to zero human code and full claude code, hihglight the moment I use github copilot for code assist (use the date the github copilot program accepting preview)
summary: Added content signals meta tags (contentsignals.org). Added 'What Claude Code Does' section to Room of Requirement. Added coding eras timeline to Trương page: Solo (2006-2021), GitHub Copilot (2021-2026), Claude Code (Apr 2026-now, zero human code).

title: Avada Kedavra: base refactor from /pensieve to /
prompt:
is it refactor EmDash to huuloc.com? so that it's easier for you to work on in the future
Avada Kedavra
summary: Refactored Astro base from /pensieve to /. Moved blog pages to src/pages/pensieve/ to preserve URLs. Converted static landing page to Astro page. Simplified worker — removed URL rewriting hack. Root-level pages (Room of Requirement, Trương) now native Astro routes.

title: Fix broken CSS after base refactor
prompt: not only that page doesn't have the activity, its css is broken now
summary: Removed build:relocate-assets script that moved /_astro/* to /pensieve/_astro/. With base: '/', assets must stay at root or CSS/JS links break.

title: HP-themed authorship banners on posts
prompt: I think when original contents is being view or AI translationed, a big nice indicator should be shown. Without this or too small an indicator, people will misunderstand that all writtings are AI's in this LLM era. Must make user aware this in a big way. indicator should be in Harry Potter's style too.
summary: Added prominent authorship banners on every post. 'Penned by Quill' (green) for original human-written content. 'Conjured Translation' (accent) for Claude-translated posts. Bilingual EN/VI. Each banner explicitly states whether content is human or AI-translated.

title: Vietnamese Priori Incantatem + RoR subagent
prompt:
Build Diary should be Vietnamese friendly too. while you're doing that, cite that the translations are done by Claude
create a RoR sub agent so that it's summoned when new tech are applied.
summary: Added Vietnamese support to Priori Incantatem (dates, type labels: Phép Thuật, Lời Tiên Tri, Reparo, Hiện Hình). Created room-of-requirement subagent for updating tech/plugins/agents on the build page.

title: GitHub token for API rate limits
prompt: sure
summary: Added GITHUB_TOKEN support to Trương page for higher GitHub API rate limits (60 → 5,000 req/hr). Token set via wrangler secret.

title: Remove bipolar mention from Trương page
prompt: Remove the bipolar disorder on about page, nice of you guessing it out. I did diagnos myself with that but I am not, I have my latest understanding what it is that I'll write about.
summary: Removed presumptive bipolar disorder mention from the about page. That's the author's story to tell.

title: Root landing page links + nav fixes
prompt:
so...you misunderstood a lot. huuloc.com root isn't EmDash, right? only /pensieve
-_- I still can't access RoR and /truong from huuloc.com content
summary: Added Room of Requirement and Trương links to the huuloc.com static landing page. Fixed nav label from 'Build' to 'Room of Requirement'. Updated seed menu to point About to /Trương.
